TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dana Andrews kawas tay 1909, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Dana Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) qnxan nya Dana Andrews hintgan beh southern Mississippi na Ťĺ≤Ťéä. cinngasal musa Huntsville Walker qalang , Steve Forrest hiya mtswe nya. Andrews mqwas beh Huntsville,Sam Houston krahu' pqwasan biru.mcbaq ssunanu mlahang koba maki Houston uzi.1931 kawas hiya musa Los Angeles,California musa' hmkangi' ppqwas na ppkayal.raral ga,hiya cingay mtzyaw nya,ru maki Van Nuys qalang halan ptkura abura mtzyaw. qyanux nya nanak 1932 kawas 12 byacing 31 ryax, Andrews ru Janet Murray wal kekong la. (Janet Murray wayal kyapun haybyo.) hiya laqi mlikuy David ga semong mqwas ru balay mqwas na squilq.pyano wal mhuqil la. 1939 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Andrews ru Mary Todd wal kekong la. maki cyugal laqi nya, lalu ga Katharine, Stephen ru Susan. 20 kawas ga, qutux ngasal maki Toluca Lake, California . pucing kalas nya, Andrews nbwan Alzheimer's . 1922 kawas 12 byacing 17 ryax, hiya wal mhuqil haybyo. 2003 kawas bes nya, wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ana an*rews~…ē kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *ana an*rews~…ē, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja *ana an*rews~…ē ńßint…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēoutńßern mis~…ēs~…ēis~…ēs~…ēippi na **. ¶~ ®inŇčas~…ēal mus~…ēa ńßunts~…ē*ille walker qalaŇč , s~…ēte*e *orres~…ēt ńßija mts~…ēwe nja. an*rews~…ē mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß ńßunts~…ē*ille,s~…ēam ńßous~…ēton krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru.m ¶~ ®ő≤aq s~…ēs~…ēunanu mlańßaŇč koő≤a maki ńßous~…ēton uzi.**** kawas~…ē ńßija mus~…ēa los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē, ¶~ ®ali*ornia mus~…ēa Ē ńßmkaŇči Ē ppqwas~…ē na ppkajal.raral …£a,ńßija ¶~ ®iŇčaj mtzjaw nja,ru maki *an nujs~…ē qalaŇč ńßalan ptkura aő≤ura mtzjaw. qjanux nja nanak **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, an*rews~…ē ru *anet murraj wal kekoŇč la. (*anet murraj wajal kjapun ńßajő≤jo.) ńßija laqi mlikuj *a*i* …£a s~…ēemoŇč mqwas~…ē ru ő≤alaj mqwas~…ē na s~…ēquilq.pjano wal mńßuqil la. **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, an*rews~…ē ru marj to** wal kekoŇč la. maki ¶~ ®ju…£al laqi nja, lalu …£a katńßarine, s~…ētepńßen ru s~…ēus~…ēan. ** kawas~…ē …£a, qutux Ňčas~…ēal maki tolu ¶~ ®a lake, ¶~ ®ali*ornia . pu ¶~ ®iŇč kalas~…ē nja, an*rews~…ē nő≤wan alzńßeimer Ēs~…ē . **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, ńßija wal mńßuqil ńßajő≤jo. **** kawas~…ē ő≤es~…ē nja, wal mńßuqil la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Dana Andrews kawas tay 1909, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Dana Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) qnxan nya Dana Andrews hintgan beh southern Mississippi na Ťĺ≤Ťéä. cinngasal musa Huntsville Walker qalang , Steve Forrest hiya mtswe nya. Andrews mqwas beh Huntsville,Sam Houston krahu' pqwasan biru.mcbaq ssunanu mlahang koba maki Houston uzi.1931 kawas hiya musa Los Angeles,California musa' hmkangi' ppqwas na ppkayal.raral ga,hiya cingay mtzyaw nya,ru maki Van Nuys qalang halan ptkura abura mtzyaw. qyanux nya nanak 1932 kawas 12 byacing 31 ryax, Andrews ru Janet Murray wal kekong la. (Janet Murray wayal kyapun haybyo.) hiya laqi mlikuy David ga semong mqwas ru balay mqwas na squilq.pyano wal mhuqil la. 1939 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Andrews ru Mary Todd wal kekong la. maki cyugal laqi nya, lalu ga Katharine, Stephen ru Susan. 20 kawas ga, qutux ngasal maki Toluca Lake, California . pucing kalas nya, Andrews nbwan Alzheimer's . 1922 kawas 12 byacing 17 ryax, hiya wal mhuqil haybyo. 2003 kawas bes nya, wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ana an*rews~…ē kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *ana an*rews~…ē, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja *ana an*rews~…ē ńßint…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēoutńßern mis~…ēs~…ēis~…ēs~…ēippi na **. ¶~ ®inŇčas~…ēal mus~…ēa ńßunts~…ē*ille walker qalaŇč , s~…ēte*e *orres~…ēt ńßija mts~…ēwe nja. an*rews~…ē mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß ńßunts~…ē*ille,s~…ēam ńßous~…ēton krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru.m ¶~ ®ő≤aq s~…ēs~…ēunanu mlańßaŇč koő≤a maki ńßous~…ēton uzi.**** kawas~…ē ńßija mus~…ēa los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē, ¶~ ®ali*ornia mus~…ēa Ē ńßmkaŇči Ē ppqwas~…ē na ppkajal.raral …£a,ńßija ¶~ ®iŇčaj mtzjaw nja,ru maki *an nujs~…ē qalaŇč ńßalan ptkura aő≤ura mtzjaw. qjanux nja nanak **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, an*rews~…ē ru *anet murraj wal kekoŇč la. (*anet murraj wajal kjapun ńßajő≤jo.) ńßija laqi mlikuj *a*i* …£a s~…ēemoŇč mqwas~…ē ru ő≤alaj mqwas~…ē na s~…ēquilq.pjano wal mńßuqil la. **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, an*rews~…ē ru marj to** wal kekoŇč la. maki ¶~ ®ju…£al laqi nja, lalu …£a katńßarine, s~…ētepńßen ru s~…ēus~…ēan. ** kawas~…ē …£a, qutux Ňčas~…ēal maki tolu ¶~ ®a lake, ¶~ ®ali*ornia . pu ¶~ ®iŇč kalas~…ē nja, an*rews~…ē nő≤wan alzńßeimer Ēs~…ē . **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, ńßija wal mńßuqil ńßajő≤jo. **** kawas~…ē ő≤es~…ē nja, wal mńßuqil la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
